description: Run checkpoint audit, two-phase repair loop, reflect, then reach DONE. Post-completion processing (learn, evolve) runs via event bus.

audit-reports/{auditor}-checkpoint-{time.description: Audit report per auditor with findings array, auditor_name, severity levels

repair-log.json.description: Repair plan with batches, tasks, assigned_executor, files, parallel flag, repair_cycle

task-retrospective.json.description: Retrospective with findings_by_auditor, findings_by_category, executor_repair_frequency, repair_cycle_count, token_usage_by_agent, quality_score, cost_score, efficiency_score

execution-log.md.description: Appended log entries for CHECKPOINT_AUDIT, REPAIR, and DONE stages
